grossFloorAreaTimelineBasis.note: 최초 설정일과 사용승인일 중 더 늦은 날짜부터 총 연면적 시계열에 반영합니다.

basis.eNoc: rent_per_py + mf_per_py, adjusted by RF/FO/TI and exclusive ratio
basis.rentMf: latest linked history row per lease_space_id; no older monetary fallback
basis.vacancy: asset gross floor area if available, otherwise max totalGrossAreaSqm in current rows
basis.nullPolicy: detail values stay null when source is missing; aggregates sum only known values; missingCounts reports omissions
